title: Fixture account parity — wallet unlocks with named SRP/private-key accounts

read-accounts.expression: (async function(){var metamask=(stateHooks.store.getState()||{}).metamask||{};var accts=metamask.internalAccounts||{};var byId=accts.accounts||{};var selected=accts.selectedAccount&&byId[accts.selectedAccount]?byId[accts.selectedAccount]:null;var list=Object.keys(byId).map(function(id){var acct=byId[id]||{};var meta=acct.metadata||{};return {id:id,name:meta.name||'',address:acct.address||'',keyringType:(meta.keyring||{}).type||'',type:acct.type||''};});var evm=list.filter(function(account){return String(account.address||'').indexOf('0x')===0;});return JSON.stringify({accountCount:list.length,evmAccountCount:evm.length,names:evm.map(function(account){return account.name;}),keyringTypes:evm.map(function(account){return account.keyringType;}),privateKeyCount:evm.filter(function(account){return account.keyringType==='Simple Key Pair';}).length,mnemonicCount:evm.filter(function(account){return account.keyringType==='HD Key Tree';}).length,selectedAccountId:accts.selectedAccount||null,selectedName:selected&&selected.metadata?selected.metadata.name||'':'',selectedAddress:selected&&selected.address?selected.address:'',accounts:list,evmAccounts:evm});})()
